name: S-15 standards-remove --dry-run reports the planned removal without mutating registry or folder per §2.14
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- '- id: custom-spec\n  url: https://x.com\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id custom-spec --dry-run 2>err.txt && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && grep -q '^- id: custom-spec$' .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && echo skipped 1>&2
